sql.name: getCouponUsageStatistics
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CLAIMED_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(cu.STATUS AS INT) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS USED_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(cu.STATUS AS INT) = 1 THEN COALESCE(o.ACTUAL_PRICE, 0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS PULLED_GMV FROM litemall_coupon_user cu LEFT JOIN litemall_order o ON o.ID = cu.ORDER_ID AND CAST(o.DELETED AS INT) = 0 WHERE CAST(cu.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND (${couponId} IS NULL OR cu.COUPON_ID = ${couponId}) AND cu.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND cu.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getPromotionEffectiveness
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS PROMOTED_ORDER_COUNT, COALESCE(SUM(ORDER_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_GMV, COALESCE(SUM(PROMOTION_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_DISCOUNT FROM litemall_order WHERE CAST(DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND CAST(ORDER_STATUS AS INT) NOT IN (102, 103) AND PROMOTION_PRICE IS NOT NULL AND PROMOTION_PRICE > 0 AND ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}

sql.name: getPinTuanEffectiveness
sql.source: SELECT COUNT(*) AS OPENED_GROUPS, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(g.STATUS AS INT) = 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SUCCESS_GROUPS, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.USER_ID) FROM litemall_pin_tuan_member m INNER JOIN litemall_pin_tuan_group g2 ON g2.ID = m.GROUP_ID WHERE CAST(m.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND (${activityId} IS NULL OR g2.ACTIVITY_ID = ${activityId}) AND g2.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND g2.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS PARTICIPANT_COUNT, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.ACTUAL_PRICE), 0) FROM litemall_pin_tuan_member m INNER JOIN litemall_pin_tuan_group g3 ON g3.ID = m.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN litemall_order o ON o.ID = m.ORDER_ID AND CAST(o.DELETED AS INT) = 0 WHERE CAST(m.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND (${activityId} IS NULL OR g3.ACTIVITY_ID = ${activityId}) AND g3.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND g3.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}) AS TOTAL_GMV FROM litemall_pin_tuan_group g WHERE CAST(g.DELETED AS INT) = 0 AND (${activityId} IS NULL OR g.ACTIVITY_ID = ${activityId}) AND g.ADD_TIME >= ${startDate} AND g.ADD_TIME <= ${endDate}
